title: combined conditions on declared table in User Defined Function definition crashes monetdb
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_table1 (id UInt64, value1 Int32, value2 Float64, status UInt8);
CREATE TABLE test_table2 (id UInt64, ref_id UInt64, description String);
SELECT value1 FROM test_table1 WHERE id >= 1 AND id <= 2 AND value2 >= 10.0 AND value2 <= 30.0;
key_bug_features: combined conditions on declared table in User Defined Function
